mapper.select:
SELECT b.BOARD_NO AS boardNo, b.WRITER_ID AS writerId, b.BOARD_TITLE AS boardTitle, b.BOARD_CONTENT AS boardContent, b.BOARD_THUMB AS boardThumb, TO_CHAR(b.BOARD_DATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS boardDate, b.MEMBER_NICKNAME AS memberNickname, b.BOARD_STATUS AS boardStatus, b.BOARD_LAT AS boardLat, b.BOARD_LNG AS boardLng, b.READ_COUNT AS readCount, NVL((SELECT COUNT(*) FROM BOARD_LIKE_TBL l WHERE l.BOARD_NO = b.BOARD_NO), 0) AS likeCount,
b.MEMBER_NICKNAME AS writerNickname, TO_CHAR(b.BOARD_DATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS createDate, b.BOARD_THUMB AS thumbnailUrl, 0 AS commentCount FROM BOARD_TBL b WHERE BOARD_STATUS = #{status}
AND BOARD_TITLE LIKE '%' || #{searchKeyword} || '%'
AND MEMBER_NICKNAME LIKE '%' || #{searchKeyword} || '%'
ORDER BY BOARD_NO DESC
mapper.insert:
SELECT ISEQ$$_80822.NEXTVAL FROM DUAL
INSERT INTO BOARD_TBL ( BOARD_NO, WRITER_ID, BOARD_TITLE, BOARD_CONTENT, BOARD_THUMB, MEMBER_NICKNAME, BOARD_STATUS, BOARD_LAT, BOARD_LNG ) VALUES ( #{boardNo}, #{writerId}, #{boardTitle}, #{boardContent}, #{boardThumb}, #{memberNickname}, #{boardStatus}, #{boardLat}, #{boardLng} )

SELECT BOARD_FILE_SEQ.NEXTVAL FROM DUAL
INSERT INTO BOARD_FILE_TBL ( FILE_NO, BOARD_NO, MEMBER_ID, BOARD_FILE_NAME, BOARD_FILE_PATH ) VALUES ( #{fileNo}, #{boardNo}, #{memberId}, #{boardFileName}, #{boardFilePath} )
mapper.select: select t.board_no, count(t.board_no) as count, b.board_title, b.ctpv, b.sgg from board_like_tbl t join board_tbl b on (t.board_no = b.board_no) where t.board_no = t.board_no group by t.board_no, b.board_title, b.ctpv, b.sgg order by 2 desc

select board_no, member_nickname, board_title, board_thumb, board_date, read_count from board_tbl where writer_id = #{memberId}
and board_title like '%' || #{searchBoard} || '%'
order by board_no desc
order by board_no asc
order by read_count desc
order by read_count asc
